Page.Width: {Binding RelativeSource={RelativeSource Mode=FindAncestor, AncestorType={x:Type ContentControl}}, Path=ActualWidth, FallbackValue=700}
Page.Height: {Binding RelativeSource={RelativeSource Mode=FindAncestor, AncestorType={x:Type ContentControl}}, Path=ActualHeight, FallbackValue=700}

Run.Text: Now that Narvik has moved out to a picket position far away, let's look at removing and adding ships from formations.

If an enemy force were detected right now, you may wish to detach your surface escorts to run at high speed to engage them, while your tanker continues to retreat in the opposite direction. The best way to do this would be to select the tanker and remove it from the formation.
You can do this by right clicking on the tanker, then going to Formation and then clicking on Leave Formation.
